title: Increase In Coal Indias Production And Offtake
section_path: Increase In Coal Indias Production And Offtake
section_path_text: Increase In Coal Indias Production And Offtake
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Coal India produced 49.8 million tons of coal in October. This is 9.1 million tons (22%) more than was produced in September and up year-on-year by 3 million tons (6%). Offtake totaled 56.7 million tons, which is 8.4 million tons (17%) more than was seen in September and up year-on-year by 6.2 million tons (12%).
